data_description.password: The password for your Libre Hardware Monitor instance.
data_description.username: The username for your Libre Hardware Monitor instance.

reauth_confirm.description: Please provide your Libre Hardware Monitor credentials.
reauth_confirm.title: Authenticate Libre Hardware Monitor

data_description.host: The IP address or hostname of the system running Libre Hardware Monitor.
data_description.port: The port of your Libre Hardware Monitor web server. By default 8085.

deprecated_api.description:
Your version of Libre Hardware Monitor is deprecated and may not provide stable sensor data. To fix this issue:

1. Download version 0.9.5 or later from {lhm_releases_url}
2. Close Libre Hardware Monitor on your computer
3. Install or extract the new version and start Libre Hardware Monitor again (you might have to re-enable the remote web server)
4. Home Assistant will detect the new version and this issue will clear automatically
deprecated_api.title: Deprecated Libre Hardware Monitor version
